spec.name: The Muddy Sewer
spec.description: You are standing in the middle of a bend of the sewer pipe. It is very dark around here and the mud is sticking to your legs, not very pleasant. The pipe leads east and south from here.

east.description: East. The mud stretches on into the darkness.

south.description: South. There is even more mud in that direction than where you are now. Incredible.

extra_descs.description: It is as dark as tar and looks like something out of a toilet, on top of that, the smell is absolutely overwhelming.
